subject: Re: image dimension of gain reference does not match (??)
body:
If you see crossing streaks you probably just need to apply a rotation on 
top of transposing

On Tuesday, January 15, 2019 at 6:57:03 AM UTC-8, Da Cui wrote:
>
> Hi Dimitry, 
>   I'm processing a dataset with Warp, and it says that image dimension of 
> gain reference doesn't match, and it asks me whether I need to rotate or 
> transpose. But after I transpose, the micrographs are not gained properly. 
> I used the same gain reference (without transpose or rotate) to process in 
> Relion, and it worked well. 
>   Do you have any suggestions so that I can proceed with Warp? Warp worked 
> perfectly with my other datasets, and it's my first time to encounter 
> question like that. 
>   Thank you so much. 
>
> Best wishes, 
>       Da 
>
